package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for select_or_get_inside_loop_lookup: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: ORM lookups (Select, Get, First, etc.) executed inside loops.
type CaseSelectOrGetInsideLoopLookupDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSelectOrGetInsideLoopLookupModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSelectOrGetInsideLoopLookupRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSelectOrGetInsideLoopLookupModel
}

type CaseSelectOrGetInsideLoopLookupService struct {
    repo *CaseSelectOrGetInsideLoopLookupRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSelectOrGetInsideLoopLookupAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSelectOrGetInsideLoopLookup(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSelectOrGetInsideLoopLookupDTO) error {
    focus := "select_or_get_inside_loop"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    batch := make([]CaseSelectOrGetInsideLoopLookupModel, 0, len(items))
    for _, item := range items { batch = append(batch, CaseSelectOrGetInsideLoopLookupModel{ID: item.ID, Status: item.Status}) }
    db.CreateInBatches(batch, 500)
    select_get_inside_loop_lookup_negative := map[string]int{"select": 1, "get": 2, "inside": 3, "loop": 4, "lookup": 5}
    select_get_inside_loop_lookup_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    select_negative_0 := select_get_inside_loop_lookup_negative["select"] + len(input)
    _ = select_negative_0
    get_negative_1 := select_get_inside_loop_lookup_negative["get"] + len(input)
    _ = get_negative_1
    inside_negative_2 := select_get_inside_loop_lookup_negative["inside"] + len(input)
    _ = inside_negative_2
    for loop_negative_3Index, item := range items { select_get_inside_loop_lookup_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_3Index }
    lookup_negative_4 := select_get_inside_loop_lookup_negative["lookup"] + len(input)
    _ = lookup_negative_4
    return nil
}
